# Configuration Overview

When HeadBlocks is loaded, you will find the following files inside the **HeadBlocks** folder:

| File / Folder                    | Description                      |
|----------------------------------|----------------------------------|
| [config.yml](global-settings.md) | Main configuration file          |
| [messages/](translations.md)     | Translation files                |
| locations.yml                    | Head locations (auto-generated)  |
| headblocks.db                    | SQLite database (auto-generated) |

## Auto-generated Files

The following are storage files used by the plugin. **Do not modify them manually.**

* **locations.yml** — Contains all head locations
* **headblocks.db** — SQLite database file that stores all player data
* **export-xxx.sql** — Generated by the `/hb export` command, contains database data for import into another database
* **server.identifier** — (**DO NOT DELETE**) Generated when using a remote database. This file is necessary for HeadBlocks to link server-specific heads to the matching entries in the database.
